ohtani.title: Edmundo Sosa comes up clutch in Phillies' 4-3 win
ohtani.blurb: Edmundo Sosa's go-ahead two-run home run lifts the Phillies to a 4-3 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
imanaga.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

suzuki.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong, Ben Brown lead Cubs to 6-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong collects four hits, including a home run and Ben Brown strikes out six to lead the Cubs to a 6-1 win over the Cardinals

yoshida.title: Connor Wong leads the Red Sox past the Guardians, 9-1
yoshida.blurb: Connor Wong drives in three runs on two hits and Jarren Duran adds a three-run homer to lead the Red Sox over the Guardians, 9-1

okamoto.title: Alonso's walk-off caps 9th inning rally in O's win
okamoto.blurb: The Orioles rally in the 9th inning and Pete Alonso hits a walk-off single in a comeback win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Jackson Merrill's late homer powers Padres to 7-5 win
matsui.blurb: Jackson Merrill's go-ahead home run in the 7th inning lifts the Padres to a 7-5 win over the Nationals
